calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Fang Wong appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that its understanding is that Mr. Wong intends to file a petition to terminate the estate for lack of assets. Mr. Wong stated that the Court is correct, that the estate was opened because his Dad was a partial owner of a house in New Jersey and that New Jersey forced him to open an estate here to transfer title of the property. Mr. Wong also stated that he used the letters that were issued here to transfer title there, that his position is that no property is going through this estate and that he was able to transfer title to his Uncle. In addition, Mr. Wong stated that this estate never took ownership of the property and that he is asking the Court to terminate the estate. The Court accepts the oral motion and terminates the estate for lack of assets.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
